hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
base = '/home/xcoder/Documents/Websites/.claude/projects/nightious'
try:
    queue = open(f'{base}/queue.md').read()
    rules_list = 'design-system.md, services.md, animations.md, tailwind.md, architecture.md'
    ctx = '''NIGHTIOUS ORCHESTRATOR PROTOCOL ACTIVE

You are an ORCHESTRATOR ONLY. You do NOT implement, research, design, or review directly.
All work MUST be dispatched to team agents: ux-designer, design-researcher, seo-researcher, tech-architect, devils-advocate, nightious-qa.

MANDATORY PREFLIGHT (before dispatching ANY agent):
1. Read queue.md (loaded below) - check task status, pick up or create tasks
2. Search QMD: qmd search \"relevant keywords\" - pull project knowledge
3. Read applicable rules from .claude/projects/nightious/rules/ (''' + rules_list + ''')
4. Check brainstorms: .claude/projects/nightious/brainstorms/ and .claude/brainstorms/
5. Inject context (rules, tokens, brainstorm decisions) into every agent prompt

ROUTING: UI/layout -> ux-designer | Design research -> design-researcher | SEO -> seo-researcher | Infra -> tech-architect | Review -> devils-advocate | QA -> nightious-qa

POST-TASK: Update queue.md + write findings to docs/ + dispatch nightious-qa if UI/a11y/SEO touched

--- queue.md ---
''' + queue
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': ctx}}))
except Exception as e:
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': 'Warning: Could not load Nightious context: ' + str(e)}}))
"

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"ORCHESTRATOR CHECK: Before dispatching this agent, confirm you completed preflight: (1) Read queue.md (2) Searched QMD for relevant knowledge (3) Read applicable rules/ files (4) Checked brainstorms/ (5) Injected context into agent prompt. If you skipped preflight, STOP and complete it now."}}'

python3 -c "
import sys, json, os
# Remind orchestrator not to edit directly - route to agents
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'additionalContext': 'ORCHESTRATOR REMINDER: You are editing a file directly. As orchestrator, implementation should be routed to team agents (ux-designer for UI, tech-architect for config). Direct edits are only acceptable for: CLAUDE.md, queue.md, docs/, rules/, and .claude/ config files.'}}))
"

python3 -c "
import json
msg = '''Nightious post-task checklist:
1. UPDATE .claude/projects/nightious/queue.md — move tasks to correct status (In Progress -> In Review -> Complete)
2. WRITE new decisions or findings to .claude/projects/nightious/docs/ (not memory — docs only)
3. DISPATCH nightious-qa if any UI, accessibility, or SEO changes were made
4. REPORT to user what was done, by which agents, and any pending review items'''
print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': msg}))
"
